ANCS client implementation, app name storage, UUID definitions, data structures, and utility functions for BLE.


## Files
- **[ancs.c](ancs.c.md)**: Implements the Apple Notification Center Service (ANCS) client for handling notifications and actions over BLE.
- **[ancs.h](ancs.h.md)**: Implements an ANCS client for handling Apple Notification Center Service interactions over BLE.
- **[ancs_app_name_storage.c](ancs_app_name_storage.c.md)**: Manages storage and retrieval of app names using a circular cache for ANCS attributes.
- **[ancs_app_name_storage.h](ancs_app_name_storage.h.md)**: Functions for initializing, deinitializing, storing, and retrieving app names in a cache.
- **[ancs_definition.h](ancs_definition.h.md)**: Defines UUIDs for the ANCS service and its characteristics in a BLE client.
- **[ancs_types.h](ancs_types.h.md)**: Defines data structures and constants for handling Apple Notification Center Service (ANCS) notifications.
- **[ancs_util.c](ancs_util.c.md)**: Utility functions for processing ANCS notification and application attribute data in BLE communication.
- **[ancs_util.h](ancs_util.h.md)**: Utility functions for handling and verifying ANCS notification and app attribute responses.
